summary: Frontend testing completed for Related Recipes feature. All 9 test cases passed. RelatedRecipes component works correctly with 4-col grid on desktop, horizontal scroll on mobile, proper recipe filtering by dish_type/country/continent priority, and 0 rating bug fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: RelatedRecipes.jsx correctly implements responsive design: hidden lg:grid for desktop 4-col, lg:hidden scroll-container for mobile
useRelatedRecipes.js properly filters by dish_type > country > continent priority and limits to 4-8 recipes
RecipeCard.jsx 0 rating bug fixed: changed 'recipe.average_rating &&' to 'recipe.average_rating > 0 &&' on line 126
All data-testid attributes present: related-recipes-section, related-recipes-grid, related-recipes-scroll
context_for_next_testing_agent: Related Recipes feature fully implemented. Uses useRelatedRecipes hook to fetch recipes via getFeatured(200) and filter client-side. Desktop shows 4-col grid, mobile shows horizontal scroll. Cards with 0 or null average_rating don't show rating text (bug fixed in RecipeCard.jsx line 126).

verified_features.feature: Related Recipes section appears on recipe pages (data-testid='related-recipes-section')
verified_features.details: Section with title 'Related Recipes' and divider found on Pizza Margherita and Mole Poblano pages

verified_features.feature: Current recipe is excluded from related recipes list
verified_features.details: pizza-margherita-italy NOT in related recipes on Pizza page; mole-poblano-mexico NOT in related on Mole page

verified_features.feature: Related recipes show correct priority: same dish_type or same country recipes for Italian recipe
verified_features.details: Pizza Margherita shows Italian recipes (Carbonara, Risotto, Arancini, Babà, Baccalà, Bagna càuda, Bombette, Bongo)

verified_features.feature: Desktop (1920px): Related recipes show in 4-column grid (data-testid='related-recipes-grid')
verified_features.details: Desktop grid visible with CSS grid-template-columns showing 4 columns (193px each)

verified_features.feature: Mobile (375px): Related recipes show in horizontal scroll container (data-testid='related-recipes-scroll')
verified_features.details: Mobile scroll visible with CSS overflow-x: auto, display: flex, flex-wrap: nowrap

verified_features.feature: Recipe cards in related section navigate correctly when clicked
verified_features.details: Clicking Spaghetti alla Carbonara card navigated to /en/recipe/spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy

verified_features.feature: Between 4 and 8 related recipe cards are displayed
verified_features.details: 8 cards displayed on both Pizza Margherita and Mole Poblano pages

verified_features.feature: Section title 'Related Recipes' with divider appears
verified_features.details: h2 with 'Related Recipes' text and section-divider class present

verified_features.feature: RecipeCard 0 rating bug fixed - cards with average_rating=0 should NOT show '0' text
verified_features.details: On Explore page: 24 cards, 16 showing ratings (all >0), 8 not showing ratings, 0 showing '0' or '0.0'

notes: Console shows 401 errors for /api/favorites/status which is expected for non-authenticated users. UNSAFE_componentWillMount warning from SideEffect component is a known React Helmet issue, not blocking.
